mapper.select:
SELECT ds.id, ds.name, ds.user_id, ds.date_type, ds.start_time, ds.end_time, ds.created_at, ds.updated_at, du.username as distributionUser_username FROM distribution_subscriptions ds left join distribution_users du on ds.user_id = du.id and du.deleted = 0 WHERE ds.deleted = 0
AND ds.name LIKE '%' || #{query.name} || '%'
ORDER BY ds.id DESC
SELECT id, name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT count(1) FROM distribution_subscriptions WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO distribution_subscriptions (name, user_id, date_type, start_time, end_time, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{userId}, #{dateType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE distribution_subscriptions SET name = #{name}, user_id = #{userId}, date_type = #{dateType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
